name: Content Type Filters
description: Filter graph nodes by document type and content classification

filters.name: Source Code Documentation
filters.description: Show only code documentation and implementation files
filters.useCase: Focus on implementation details and code architecture

filters.description: Show governance frameworks and policy documents
filters.useCase: Review organizational guidelines and compliance requirements

filters.description: Show system architecture and design documentation

filters.name: API References
filters.description: Show API documentation and endpoint references
filters.useCase: Navigate API contracts and integration points

filters.name: Testing Documentation
filters.description: Show test plans, cases, and QA documentation

filters.name: Deployment & Operations
filters.description: Show deployment guides and operational documentation

filters.name: User Documentation
filters.useCase: Review user experience and documentation quality

filters.name: Agent Mission Reports
filters.description: Show AI agent mission completion reports
filters.useCase: Track agent deliverables and project progress

filters.name: Security Documentation
filters.description: Show security audits, vulnerability reports, and security guides

filters.name: Templates & Examples
filters.description: Show document templates and example files

filters.name: Archived Content
filters.description: Hide archived and deprecated content (default: hidden)
filters.useCase: Focus on current, active documentation only

filters.name: Orphan Nodes
filters.description: Hide nodes with no connections or tags

applyingFilters: Toggle filters on/off using the queries above
